boosts.description: Advanced Training <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Once per Round, when a Friendly Support Unit activates a Special Ability that costs CP, resolve that ability with its CP cost reduced by 1 (to a minimum of 0). Do not Exhaust this card.

boosts.description: Ready for Pickup? <Active> <Movement Phase>: Once per Game. The active Unit resolves the PLACE (12) effect. Models placed by this effect cannot be set up Within the Engagement Range of any Enemy Unit. This resolves instead of performing a standard action.
Tactical Retreat <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Unit ignores the Disengage penalty for the remainder of the Round.
